name: supervibe
description: AI coding agent framework: 81 specialist agents · 10-language code graph + multilingual semantic RAG · project memory · 14 confidence rubrics · live preview-server.

interface.shortDescription: 81 specialist agents + code graph + semantic RAG + project memory + confidence gates.
interface.longDescription: Supervibe turns any AI coding agent into a team of specialists with fixed methodology. Includes a code graph (10 languages) for refactor blast-radius checks, multilingual semantic RAG over your codebase, persistent project memory (decisions / patterns / incidents / learnings / solutions), and confidence-rubric gates that block merges below 9/10. Pure Node 22+ — no Docker, no native compilation, no external services.
defaultPrompt: Run /supervibe-genesis to scaffold .claude/ for this project's stack.
Who calls processPayment? — show callers with file:line.
Find prior decisions on idempotency in this repo's memory.
